mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_DONATION.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO DONATION ( DONATION_ID, MEMBER_ID, DONATION_AMOUNT, DONATION_DATE, DONATION_METHOD, PAYMENT_TYPE, DONATOR_NAME, DONATOR_TEL, DONATOR_EMAIL, RECEIPT_YN, REG_NO1, REG_NO2 ) VALUES ( #{donationId}, #{memberId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{donationAmount}, SYSDATE, #{donationMethod}, #{donationType}, #{donatorName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{donatorTel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{donatorEmail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receiptYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regNo1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{regNo2, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT DONATION_ID AS donationId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, DONATION_AMOUNT AS donationAmount, DONATION_DATE AS createDate, DONATION_METHOD AS donationMethod, PAYMENT_TYPE AS donationType, DONATOR_NAME AS donatorName, RECEIPT_YN AS receiptYn FROM DONATION WHERE MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY DONATION_DATE DESC

SELECT DONATION_ID AS donationId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, DONATION_AMOUNT AS donationAmount, DONATION_DATE AS createDate, PAYMENT_TYPE AS donationType, DONATOR_NAME AS donatorName, DONATOR_TEL AS donatorTel, DONATOR_EMAIL AS donatorEmail, RECEIPT_YN AS receiptYn, REG_NO1 AS regNo1 FROM DONATION WHERE DONATION_ID = #{donationId} AND MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} AND RECEIPT_YN IN ('Y', 'I')

SELECT NVL(SUM(DONATION_AMOUNT), 0) AS totalAmount, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN TRUNC(DONATION_DATE, 'MM') = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') THEN 1 END) AS thisMonthCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN RECEIPT_YN = 'Y' THEN 1 END) AS receiptCount FROM DONATION

SELECT DONATION_ID AS donationId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, DONATION_AMOUNT AS donationAmount, DONATION_DATE AS createDate, DONATOR_NAME AS donatorName, REG_NO1 AS regNo1, RECEIPT_YN AS receiptYn FROM DONATION WHERE RECEIPT_YN IN ('Y', 'I') ORDER BY DONATION_DATE DESC, DONATION_ID DESC

SELECT DONATION_ID AS donationId, MEMBER_ID AS memberId, DONATION_AMOUNT AS donationAmount, TO_CHAR(DONATION_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS donationDateStr, DONATION_DATE AS createDate, DONATION_METHOD AS donationMethod, PAYMENT_TYPE AS donationType, DONATOR_NAME AS donatorName, DONATOR_TEL AS donatorTel, DONATOR_EMAIL AS donatorEmail, RECEIPT_YN AS receiptYn FROM DONATION WHERE 1=1
AND ( DONATOR_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR MEMBER_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
AND DONATION_METHOD = #{method}
AND PAYMENT_TYPE = #{paymentType}
AND DONATION_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND DONATION_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
ORDER BY DONATION_DATE DESC, DONATION_ID DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT MEMBER_ID AS memberId, DONATOR_NAME AS donatorName, SUM(DONATION_AMOUNT) AS totalAmount, COUNT(*) AS donationCount FROM DONATION WHERE TRUNC(DONATION_DATE, 'MM') = TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM') GROUP BY MEMBER_ID, DONATOR_NAME ORDER BY SUM(DONATION_AMOUNT) DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
mapper.update: UPDATE DONATION SET DONATOR_NAME = #{donatorName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DONATION_AMOUNT = #{donationAmount}, PAYMENT_TYPE = #{donationType}, DONATION_METHOD = #{donationMethod} WHERE DONATION_ID = #{donationId}
